text:
Author : Dr. Reza Katebi
A different approach to corona treatment
Publish date : Spring 2020
1 | P a g e
A different approach to corona treatment
Due to the prevalence of Corona virus and the nature of the symptoms of it and
considering that other treatments, in addition to routine treatments, can help and
alleviate patients' pain, Experienced and effective solutions have been collected and
compiled for the use of colleagues interested in these methods.
 These tips are mainly taken from the sources of acupuncture by (TUNG) method,
BLEEDING (Blood letting) and Korean Sujok treatment methods.
2 | P a g e
Abbreviations used in this Article
 NG  Acupuncture / Needling
 BLG  Bleeding or bloodletting
 SUJ  Sujok treatment
3 | P a g e
General principles
